item.title: Skill Audit & Gap Plan Challenge 🛠️ • List 5 job roles you aspire to. • Identify 3 key skills for each role. • Rate your proficiency in each skill 1-5. • Find 1 resource to improve each low-rated skill. • Set a 2-day plan to start learning. What skill gaps did you identify, and what's your plan to address one this week? #skills #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Skill Audit & Gap Plan Challenge 🛠️ • List 5 job roles you aspire to. • Identify 3 key skills for each role. • Rate your proficiency in each skill 1-5. • Find 1 resource to improve each low-rated skill. • Set a 2-day plan to start learning. What skill gaps did you identify, and what's your plan to address one this week? #skills #career #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
